svg.title: HyperWeave Data Connectors — brutalist.azure matrix
svg.desc: A 11-row connector registry table: provider, source, identifier shape, available metrics, and live/literal kind. Machine-readable registry and a compressed hwz/1 envelope are embedded in metadata.

hw:reasoning.hw:intent: Render the README Data Connectors table as a scannable instrument: provider glyph for instant recognition, identifier shape in mono, the full per-provider metric vocabulary as chips, and live-vs-literal kind as an orthogonal channel — a representation a markdown table cannot match at a glance.
hw:reasoning.hw:approach: Single connector registry drives both the SVG and the embedded metadata. Column widths and per-row heights are derived from measured content via per-codepoint advance LUTs (JetBrains Mono / Space Grotesk); metric chips greedy-pack into the metrics column and rows grow to fit, so dense providers (hf, arxiv at 8 metrics) get taller rows automatically. No coordinate is hardcoded.
hw:reasoning.hw:tradeoffs: Glyphs are rendered monochrome in genome ink rather than brand color, trading per-provider color recall for genome coherence (the Symphony Doctrine — palette preserved across the family); a brand-tint toggle is the obvious follow-up. Literal rows (text/kv) use a dashed single descriptor chip instead of metric chips because they carry behavior, not an enumerable metric set.
hw:reasoning.hw:spatial-notes: Canvas 859x799. Five columns (provider/source/identifier/metrics/kind) on a left-to-right reading axis; metrics column is the widest at 318px and the only wrapping zone. Title masthead is 104px, column-header band 34px, footer 50px. Variable row heights (min 46px) — total body height is the sum of measured row heights, not row_count x fixed_pitch. Left accent rail anchors the reading start; alternating row tint at 0.5 opacity aids horizontal tracking across 11 rows.

metadata.hw:payload: {"schema":"hw.connectors/1","grammar":{"query":"?data=<tok>[,<tok>…]","token":"<provider>:<id>.<metric> | text:<v> | kv:<K=V>","escape":"embedded commas in text:/kv: escape as \\,"},"cache":{"ttl_s":[300,600],"fail_ttl_s":60,"sentinel":"—","breaker":"per-provider"},"connectors":[{"p":["gh","github"],"src":"GitHub","id":"owner/repo","kind":"live","m":["stars","forks","watchers","issues","license","language","build"]},{"p":["pypi"],"src":"PyPI + pepy.tech","id":"package","kind":"live","m":["version","license","python_requires","downloads"]},{"p":["npm"],"src":"npm registry","id":"package","kind":"live","m":["version","license","downloads"]},{"p":["crates","cargo"],"src":"crates.io","id":"crate","kind":"live","m":["version","downloads","recent_downloads","license"]},{"p":["hf","huggingface"],"src":"HuggingFace Hub","id":"org/model","kind":"live","m":["downloads","likes","tags","pipeline_tag","library_name","license","gated","last_modified"]},{"p":["docker"],"src":"Docker Hub","id":"namespace/repo","kind":"live","m":["pull_count","star_count","last_updated"]},{"p":["arxiv"],"src":"arXiv API","id":"id · 2310.06825","kind":"live","m":["title","authors","published","updated","categories","summary","journal_ref","doi"]},{"p":["scorecard"],"src":"OpenSSF Scorecard","id":"owner/repo","kind":"live","m":["score","code_review","maintained","vulnerabilities","token_permissions","…"]},{"p":["dora"],"src":"GitHub Actions","id":"owner/repo","kind":"live","m":["deploy_frequency","lead_time","change_failure_rate","mttr"]},{"p":["text"],"src":"literal","id":"—","kind":"literal","m":["renders payload as displayed text"]},{"p":["kv"],"src":"literal","id":"KEY=VALUE","kind":"literal","m":["static role-tagged value"]}]}
metadata.hw:envelope: {"v":"hwz/1","id":"sha256:c5c14807f58fa0e4","k":"reference-table","ttok":479,"ref":"hw://doc/c5c14807#payload","title":"HyperWeave Data Connectors","intent":"Connector registry for the ?data= grammar: provider prefixes, identifier shapes, and the metrics each exposes.","state":"stable","data":{"connectors_n":11,"live":9,"literal":2,"token_fmt":"<provider>:<id>.<metric>","prefixes":["gh","pypi","npm","crates","hf","docker","arxiv","scorecard","dora","text","kv"],"sentinel":"—"},"frames":[{"t":"matrix","l":"data connectors","rows":11,"cols":5}],"prov":{"by":"hyperweave","ver":"0.4.0","genome":"brutalist.azure","ts":"2026-06-01"}}

svg.text: Live tokens cache 5–10 min · failures cache 60 s → em-dash sentinel · per-provider circuit breaker
